name: "Inherited" NEET Tenant
description:
Oh, and did I mention?
She isn't just a NEET.
She is quite a pervert, mh.
=========================
It's been almost a month since...
your dear grandmother passed away.
Well... was she really dear to you,
if you never visited her in the first place?
Yet now, it's all in the past,
and you should look at the present -
at the apartment she left you in her will. ~
=========================
Yet it's not without a trouble.
Or, without a NEET living there.
=========================
Now you are the owner of the apartment.
And she is your tenant. A broke one.
Wanna try and simply use the situation?
Or help her out? It's up to you.
I won't judge you nevertheless ~
=========================
Cover art made by myself, heh.
I know it's imperfect.
But it's all I can do for now~
=========================
Don't be shy to leave any reviews,
I will take any opinion to make this better ~
=========================
Now go, my dear new owners ~
creator: koneko_chan
